P_B.description: Probability that a complaint originated during the guarantee period, i.e., P(B) = 63%, obtained from the row total of 'During Guarantee Period' in the contingency table.

P_A_intersect_B.description: Joint probability that the complaint was caused by product appearance AND originated during the guarantee period, i.e., P(A ∩ B) = 32%, obtained from the corresponding cell in the contingency table.
